content.speakerText: I’ve been watching your journey—you’ve inspired me to push harder.
content.speakerTextCn: 我一直关注你的成长，你激励我更努力了。

options.text: Thanks, I guess I’m just lucky.
Aw, that means a lot coming from you!
Yeah, I’ve been working really hard.
I don’t think I’ve done anything special.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Aw, that means a lot coming from you!' 是对他人真诚赞美时最自然、有情感回应的表达，强调了对方认可的价值。其他选项要么过于谦卑（opt_1, opt_4），要么只是陈述事实（opt_3），缺乏对对方情感的回应，不符合表达敬佩场景中的社交礼仪。

content.speakerText: I’m just getting started—I’ve got big goals ahead.
content.speakerTextCn: 我才刚起步，前面还有大目标呢。

options.text: That’s great, I’m sure you’ll make it.
You’ve got the drive—I know you’ll crush it.
I hope you don’t give up.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You’ve got the drive—I know you’ll crush it.' 使用了地道表达 'crush it'（大获成功）和积极肯定的语气，完美回应了对方的雄心。opt_1 虽然正面但太泛泛；opt_3 和 opt_4 暗含负面或担忧情绪，不符合鼓励敬佩的语境。

content.speakerText: Your ability to balance work and family is amazing—I look up to you.
content.speakerTextCn: 你能在工作和家庭之间取得平衡，太了不起了，我非常敬佩你。

options.text: Oh, it’s not that hard, really.
That’s so kind of you to say—I’m still learning every day.
Yeah, I wish I could do that.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'That’s so kind of you to say—I’m still learning every day.' 既表达了感激，又保持谦逊，符合敬佩场景中的得体回应。opt_1 和 opt_4 过于轻描淡写，削弱了对方的赞美；opt_3 表达了羡慕但未回应对方的情感，显得冷漠。

content.template: I’ve been watching your journey—you’ve inspired me to push harder. Aw, that means a lot ___ you!
content.hint: 强调对方认可的价值时，常用这个固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：coming from you（强调来自对方的认可）

content.template: You’ve got the drive—I know you’ll ___ it.
content.hint: 口语中表达‘大获成功’的地道动词
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：crush it（口语中表示彻底成功）

content.template: I really look up to you because you never give up, even when things get tough.
content.hint: 表达‘敬佩、仰慕’的常用短语
content.knowledgePoint: 固定短语：look up to（敬佩某人）

content.speakerText: I’ve been watching your journey—you’ve inspired me to push harder.
content.speakerTextCn: 我一直关注你的成长，你激励我更努力了。
expectedAnswers: Aw, that means a lot coming from you!
I’m truly honored—I hope you’re proud of how far you’ve come too.
That’s so encouraging, thank you! You’re inspiring me too.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应了对方的赞美
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'coming from you' 或类似强调对方认可的表达

content.speakerText: I’m just getting started—I’ve got big goals ahead.
content.speakerTextCn: 我才刚起步，前面还有大目标呢。
expectedAnswers: Then I’ll be first in line cheering you on!
You’ve got the drive—I know you’ll crush it.
I believe in you—your determination will take you further than you think.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否给予积极鼓励并认可对方的雄心
语言准确性：语法和词汇是否准确，是否避免消极表达
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达如 'crush it' 或 'cheering you on'
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'crush it', 'cheering you on', 或 'drive' 等关键词

content.speakerText: You’ve overcome so much—I really admire how you stay positive.
content.speakerTextCn: 你克服了这么多困难，我真的很佩服你保持积极的态度。
expectedAnswers: Thank you—that means the world to me.
I appreciate that so much. Your own resilience inspires me too.
It’s not always easy, but your support keeps me going.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感激并回馈正面情感
语言准确性：是否避免了否定或轻视对方赞美
表达自然度：是否使用了自然、有情感的回应，而非机械应付
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'means the world', 'appreciate', 'inspires me' 等情感表达
